## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSession.selectChocolate() method

Selects a chocolate for a specific role.

**Signature:**

```typescript
selectChocolate(role: ChocolateRole, ingredientId: IngredientId): Result<true>;
```

Result&lt;true&gt;

Success, or Failure if the role is not supported for this confection
